qualification.notes: Applicants must generally be adults (19 years or older) and household heads. However, minors who are household heads and meet specific conditions (raising children or supporting siblings due to parental death/disappearance) may also qualify. All household members must be listed on the household registration.

homeless_period.description: All household members must not own a house as of the public notice date. The period of homelessness is calculated based on the applicant and their spouse, starting from the day they turn 30, or from the marriage registration date if married before 30. (2 points per year, up to 15 years)

dependents.description: Dependents include household members listed on the same household registration with the applicant or their spouse as of the public notice date, including unmarried children and direct ancestors under specific conditions. (5 points per dependent)

subscription_period.description: Calculates the housing subscription savings period, starting from 1 point for less than 6 months, up to 17 points for 15 years or more. (1 point per year, after initial period)
